# Help us improve MonsterInsights (in under a minute)

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-11 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 289

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Can you please spare a minute?

At MonsterInsights, we strive to provide you with the best
experience possible and make it super easy to find the data you
need to grow your business.

To continue offering new features our users will love, I really
need your feedback!

I’ve created a quick survey that will only take a minute to
complete, and it will be immensely helpful for us in making
MonsterInsights even better for you.

👉 Take the quick survey now! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3QRth8wgHTUpWdvDBYAsfbNv6RZu5bGsfKCwSUrm-TY )
 👈

Once again, we really appreciate your support for making
MonsterInsights the best Google Analytics WordPress plugin.

Thank you,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator
